parameters.text:
Hi, thanks for your message. I am not confident enough about what you want to do.

You can ask me things like:
- "Get onboarding suppliers for client demo-client"
- "Show supplier risk for client demo-client"
- "List active purchase orders for client demo-client"
- "Show pending invoices for client demo-client"
- "Show critical deliveries for client demo-client"
- "Show picking tasks for client demo-client"
- "Show expiring contracts for client demo-client"
- "Show spend analytics for client demo-client this month"

Please tell me which type of insight you need (for example: onboarding suppliers, supplier risk, active purchase orders, approvals, picking tasks, receiving tasks, critical deliveries, tracking, pending invoices, expiring contracts, spend analytics) and the clientId. I will then ask for any extra details I need.

Hi, before I run anything I want to be sure I understood you correctly (at least 90%).

I can help you with these Leviatan routes:
1) Supplier onboarding – /suppliers/onboarding
2) Supplier risk – /suppliers/risk-assessment
3) Active purchase orders – /purchase-orders/active
4) Purchase order approvals – /purchase-orders/approvals
5) Warehouse picking tasks – /warehouse/picking-tasks
6) Warehouse receiving tasks – /warehouse/receiving-tasks
7) Critical deliveries – /deliveries/critical
8) Delivery tracking – /deliveries/tracking
9) Pending invoices – /invoices/pending
10) Expiring contracts – /contracts/expiring
11) Spend analytics – /spend/analytics

Please reply with one of these options and include:
- clientId (for example: client demo-client)
- Any filters you care about (for example: status in progress, risk level high, due date, period month).

Once you confirm, I will run the right endpoint and send a concise summary plus a well-formatted PDF if the list is long.
